title: Pioneering treatment saves identical twins from rare pregnancy condition
description: Identical twins Nancy and Margo benefitted from the procedure while in the womb as part of a world-first medical trial.
content:
A pioneering procedure using high-powered sound waves has the potential to treat identical twins affected by a serious but rare condition during early pregnancy, a study has found.

title: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
description: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
content:
As parts of the UK brace for another hot weekend, online adverts have been appearing for portable air conditioners claiming to be "designed by former Nasa engineers" and able to "cool a room in 90 seconds".

title: What to know about 'explosive diarrhoea' parasite outbreak in US
description: The source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak, which has spread across at least 17 states, is unclear.
content:
A diarrhoea-causing parasite outbreak has spread in a number of US states, with thousands of cases reported in recent weeks.

title: UK bakes in 35C highs as heatwave to continue next week
description: On Thursday, temperatures exceeded 34C for the eighth day this year, breaking the previous record of seven days in a calendar year.
content:
The UK is set to bake in another day of 35C highs, with temperatures expected to remain at heatwave level until the end of next week.
